title: The Reason [the Descendants of Hasan] Were Transported to Iraq and How Matters Stood for Them at That Time
description: Transported to Iraq and How Matters Stood for Them at That Time According to `Umar-Musa b. `Abdallah-his father-his father: When Abu Jacfar made the Pilgrimage, he sent Muhammad b. `Imran b. Ibrahim b. Muhammad b. Talhah584 and Malik b. Anas585 to our associates [in prison], asking them to urge 583. Musa b. `Abdallah b. Musa b. `Abdallah b. Hasan was a Baghdadi traditionist whose grandfather was Muhammad b. `Abdallah's brother. Al-Khatib alBaghdidi, Ta'rikh Baghdad, XIII, 39-40; Nagel, "Bericht, " 244. 584. Muhammad b. `Imran b. Ibrahim b. Muhammad b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 28
